title: BearerAuth and BasicAuth: derive Clone
description:
## Why

BearerAuth and BasicAuth store a pre-computed HeaderValue. HeaderValue is Clone. There is no reason these types cannot be Clone. Currently callers building pools, multi-region clients, or tests that need multiple client instances with the same auth must re-construct and re-validate the auth type for each instance rather than cloning once.

## What needs to be done

Add #[derive(Clone)] (or hand-implement Clone) to BearerAuth and BasicAuth. Add a test asserting that a constructed BearerAuth or BasicAuth can be cloned and that the clone produces an identical auth header.
